name: macOS Roadmap 300 Batch 04
description: Executable batch generated directly from the macOS 300-scenario roadmap.

tests.name: Password Guessing: caldera chain
tests.fallback_command: sh -lc 'test -r /etc/passwd && head -n 1 /etc/passwd >/dev/null; security list-keychains >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; id >/dev/null'
tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
